title: Inside the Congolese Hotel Where Trump Deported 15 U.S. Migrants
summary_full: They were shackled and sent to Kinshasa by the Trump administration. Now they face a dangerous choice: Go back to Latin America or stay in Africa.
summary_public: They were shackled and sent to Kinshasa by the Trump administration. Now they face a dangerous choice: Go back to Latin America or stay in Africa.
